scope: Height, clouds and emission source files where useful for planets and moons under Sol from system_details. Sol star excluded; Phobos/Deimos use shape_model instead of equirectangular height.
honesty_note: Files in this pack are project-generated plausible placeholders, not authoritative NASA/USGS/NOAA science products. They complete the future source layer for architecture/testing and can be replaced body-by-body with real mission data.

contract.projection: equirectangular 2:1 maps matching existing albedo_source dimensions

assets.source_name: Procedural future height source generated from body archetype and current albedo dimensions
assets.license_note: Project-generated placeholder. Replace with authoritative mission/DEM/cloud/emission data where available before claiming scientific accuracy.
modifications: Generated as equirectangular source map
Sized to match existing albedo_source dimensions

recommended_authoritative_replacements.note: Use ETOPO 2022 GeoTIFF/NetCDF, normalize to grayscale and resize to albedo dimensions.

recommended_authoritative_replacements.source_name: NASA SVS Equirectangular Projected Earth for LARGEST
recommended_authoritative_replacements.note: Can derive cloud mask from clouded and no-cloud Earth images.

recommended_authoritative_replacements.source_name: NASA Black Marble / Earth at Night Flat Maps
recommended_authoritative_replacements.note: Use 2016 grayscale global JPEG/GeoTIFF as emission source.

recommended_authoritative_replacements.source_name: NASA SVS CGI Moon Kit displacement map

recommended_authoritative_replacements.note: Use DEM or browse image; normalize/resize.
